title: Load Test Framework
purpose: Implement a load testing framework for the governance runtime that simulates large event streams, replay storms, concurrent locks, massive audits, and reflection regeneration.
architectural_constraints: Tests must be deterministic and reproducible
Must measure replay latency, lock contention, event throughput, storage growth, audit overhead, memory growth
acceptance_criteria: Simulates full audit run under load
All simulations run in isolated test environment
